name: MiniContacts
author: Esmanur Ceviz
v1_prompt: Implement the command-line contact manager {{binary_name}}_v1.py precisely as described in Spec_v1.txt using Python, without using loops or complex data structures.
v2_prompt: Read spec_v2.txt and extend your existing {{binary_name}} program to support 'list', 'search', and 'clear' commands using loops for data processing.
